sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114510" key="xortopa/thtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χορτο-πάτητος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>: neut., <sense id="n114510.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">threshed straw,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐσθίουσι χ. μικτὸν ἀχύρῳ ἐπὶ τῆς ἄλω</foreign> ib.<bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,P.Oxy.:1734:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1734.4</biblScope></bibl>, al. <date TEIform="date">(ii/iii A. D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
